comments.author: @Travelfun4ever
comments.text:
Great video 
If you travel to these places from video you will experience Bali 

Kuta Seminyak Legian very touristy and busy, Nusa Dua  concrete jungle overpriced 

But Ubud although busy a good starting point to start your holiday close to all these places 

Then out to Candidasa min two night stay followed by Amed/ bay Stunning  min 5 nights stunning and mountainous like old Balinese paintings 

After watching Visio it reminds me why I love this place
